Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./db'\); db.init\(\); const rows = db.all\('SELECT id, style_no, color, secondary_types, status FROM styles LIMIT 5'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const db=require\('./db'\); const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT id,style_no,secondary_types,status FROM styles LIMIT 10'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const{init,getDb}=require\('./db'\); init\(\); const db=getDb\(\); const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT id,style_no,color,size_spec,secondary_types,status FROM styles ORDER BY id LIMIT 10'\).all\(\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.id, r.style_no, r.color, r.size_spec, '| sec:', JSON.stringify\(r.secondary_types\), '| status:', JSON.stringify\(r.status\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const ExcelJS = require\('exceljs'\); console.log\('OK', ExcelJS.Workbook ? 'has Workbook' : 'no Workbook'\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('data.sqlite'\); console.log\('styles count:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as count FROM styles'\).get\(\).count\); console.log\('sample:', db.prepare\('SELECT id, style_no, product_name FROM styles LIMIT 3'\).all\(\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('count:', j.length\); console.log\('sample:', j.slice\(0,2\)\)")
